examples: So-called serpentine soils, for example, are deficient in calcium, and only plants able to tolerate low levels of this mineral can survive.
The elongated, serpentine body that allows land snakes to slither through dense grass also serves aquatic snakes in propelling through the water.
Why don't most places encourage serpentine lines?
Serpentine queues outside restaurants are de rigueur in a city that is always on the move.
You are nearly in Olympos, just a 20-minute ride down a serpentine route to the tree houses.
